_comment_design: Tiny Tapeout submission: top is the standard tt_um_* wrapper. The wrapper instantiates the full `gpu` core; multi-tile sizing is required.
_comment_clock: Tiny Tapeout user clock is 10 MHz nominal (100 ns period).
_comment_pdk: Sky130A high-density, 1.8V — Tiny Tapeout 7+ uses sky130A.
_comment_floorplan: 4x2 tiles (~640 x 200 um per Tiny Tapeout 7 spec). Final tile count locked once first harden run reports utilisation.
_comment_dev: tiny-gpu uses unpacked-array module ports; OpenLane2 invokes sv2v internally when USE_SYNLIG is off.
_comment_synthesis_strategy: Optimise for area on Tiny Tapeout (logic is the dominant constraint, not Fmax).
_comment_signoff: Magic + Netgen LVS, OpenROAD STA. Linter on. CVC off (run separately if needed).
